commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
Changes outbound delivery recovery so ambiguous `send_attempt_started` and `unknown_after_send` entries without adapter reconciliation remain pending with retry metadata, updates recovery/reconnect tests, and adds Discord troubleshooting wording.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +20, Docs 0. Total +23 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source/proof level: current main moves no-reconciliation ambiguous entries out of pending, and the PR body shows terminal output from real queue APIs and SQLite state where recovery refuses replay and keeps the entry pending. I did not run tests locally because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can update the missed real-SQLite integration test without choosing new product semantics.

target.title: [codex] Keep ambiguous delivery attempts recoverable
target.body:
## Summary

- Keeps outbound delivery entries in ambiguous post-send states pending when adapter reconciliation is unavailable.
- Preserves the existing no-blind-replay behavior while leaving the entry retryable for later reconciliation/backoff.
- Updates startup recovery, reconnect-drain, and outbound queue integration coverage plus Discord troubleshooting guidance for #87544.

## Scope

This is a narrow mitigation for #87544 and intentionally does not close the full issue. The broader transcript-to-provider delivery ledger, Discord reconciliation semantics, and UI/API surfacing still need maintainer design.

## Validation

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/outbound/deliver.queue-integration.test.ts src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue.recovery.test.ts src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue.reconnect-drain.test.ts`
  - 3 files passed, 41 tests passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/infra/outbound/deliver.queue-integration.test.ts src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue-recovery.ts src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue.recovery.test.ts src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue.reconnect-drain.test.ts docs/channels/troubleshooting.md`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: ambiguous outbound delivery entries whose platform send may have started must not be blindly replayed, and must remain retryable instead of being moved to failed when adapter reconciliation is unavailable.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source checkout on macOS with Node v22.22.3, rebased onto `openclaw/openclaw@c5d34c8376f8aa32744786cae0473c60e39ef444`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: ran a one-off `node --import tsx --input-type=module` terminal proof that invoked the real `enqueueDelivery`, `markDeliveryPlatformOutcomeUnknown`, `recoverPendingDeliveries`, `loadPendingDeliveries`, and SQLite state reader against a temporary OpenClaw state directory. The proof queued an `unknown_after_send` outbound entry, ran recovery with no reconciliation-capable adapter, and failed if `deliver` was called or the entry did not remain pending.

Evidence after fix:

```text
info: Found 1 pending delivery entries ŌĆö starting recovery
warn: Delivery entry <redacted-queue-id> delivery state is unknown_after_send; refusing blind replay without adapter reconciliation
warn: Retry failed for delivery <redacted-queue-id>: delivery state is unknown_after_send; refusing blind replay without adapter reconciliation
info: Delivery recovery complete: 0 recovered, 1 failed, 0 skipped (max retries), 0 deferred (backoff)
proof summary: {"recovered":0,"failed":1,"skippedMaxRetries":0,"deferredBackoff":0}
deliver call count: 0
pending entries: 1
queue row: {"status":"pending","retry_count":1,"recovery_state":"unknown_after_send"}
```

Observed result after fix: recovery refused blind replay, did not call the delivery function, kept exactly one pending queue entry, and persisted `status: "pending"`, `retry_count: 1`, and `recovery_state: "unknown_after_send"`.

What was not tested: no live Discord gateway/channel send was performed in this pass. The broader transcript-to-provider delivery ledger, Discord reconciliation semantics, and Control UI/API delivery-state surface remain open under #87544.
target.author: solavrc
